username.description: Alpaca Broker API Key ID, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: Alpaca Broker API Secret Key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Alpaca Broker API base URL. Defaults to the sandbox host, matching legacy's default when 'environment' is unset; override to https://broker-api.alpaca.markets/v1 for production. Legacy also derives this from an 'environment' enum (api/paper-api/broker-api.sandbox) at runtime; this bundle requires the resolved URL directly since the engine's spec-default mechanism only materializes a fixed literal, not an enum-derived value (documented scope narrowing, see docs.md).

limit.description: Records per page for the 'accounts' stream (matches legacy's page_token cursor limit).
